_comment: PLACEHOLDER — best-case clean-state fixture: zero exec_issues, all 24 checks PASS. Replace with real clean report when available.

sections.title: Source Chain-of-Custody
sections.clean_line: Human review authority, external verification, generation record, and audit trail all documented.

checks.name: Human review authority
checks.finding: Named review board with documented scope disclosed.

checks.name: External verification
checks.finding: Third-party verification report publicly accessible.

checks.name: Generation record
checks.finding: Timestamped generation record with cryptographic signature.

checks.name: Audit trail
checks.finding: Complete audit trail accessible to authorised parties.

sections.title: Data Provenance
sections.clean_line: Source citations, data retention, access controls, and provenance chain all present.

checks.name: Source citation
checks.finding: All statistics cited with primary source references.

checks.name: Data retention
checks.finding: Documented retention schedule published.

checks.name: Access controls
checks.finding: Role-based access documented and enforced.

checks.name: Provenance chain
checks.finding: Full data lineage traceable from source to output.

sections.title: Model Transparency
sections.clean_line: Model card, version history, limitations, and training data disclosure all complete.

checks.name: Model card
checks.finding: Comprehensive model card published.

checks.name: Version history
checks.finding: Public changelog with dated releases.

checks.name: Limitations disclosure
checks.finding: Known limitations documented in model card.

checks.name: Training data disclosure
checks.finding: Training data sources and composition disclosed.

sections.title: Governance
sections.clean_line: AI ethics board, incident response, bias testing, and override mechanism all in place.

checks.name: AI ethics board
checks.finding: Independent ethics board with public roster.

checks.name: Incident response
checks.finding: AI incident response plan published.

checks.name: Bias testing
checks.finding: Regular bias audit schedule with published results.

checks.name: Human override
checks.finding: Human override documented for all automated decisions.

sections.title: Regulatory Alignment
sections.clean_line: EU AI Act classification, GDPR alignment, sector compliance, and disclosure obligations all met.

checks.name: EU AI Act classification
checks.finding: High-risk conformity assessment complete and published.

checks.name: GDPR alignment
checks.finding: DPIA conducted; DPO contact published.

checks.name: Sector compliance
checks.finding: FCA sandbox participation documented.

checks.name: Disclosure obligations
checks.finding: All statutory AI disclosure requirements met.

sections.title: Security & Privacy
sections.clean_line: Privacy policy, DPA, security certification, and vulnerability disclosure all present.

checks.name: Privacy policy
checks.finding: Comprehensive privacy policy current and accessible.

checks.name: Data processing agreement
checks.finding: DPA template published for enterprise clients.

checks.name: Security certification
checks.finding: SOC 2 Type II available under NDA.

checks.name: Vulnerability disclosure
checks.finding: Responsible disclosure policy and security.txt present.
